text:
TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: 01 = Face-to-face 
02 = Telephone 
03 = Telehealth consultation (e.g., video conferencing) 
99 = Other 
Null/missing = No communications sent to beneficiary regarding safe disposal of medications 

COMMENT: This field is available in the 2022+ data files.
